title: GEMS: Your Health, Your Future – Medical Cover Built for Public Service Employees
description: BUSINESS NEWS - When it comes to your...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - When it comes to your health, you deserve a medical scheme that understands your healthcare needs, no matter your salary band. That’s why the Government Employees Medical Scheme (GEMS) is proud to be the trusted healthcare partner for public service employees across the country.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - When it comes to your health, you deserve a medical scheme that understands your healthcare needs, no matter your salary band. That’s why the Government Employees Medical Scheme (GEMS) is proud to be the trusted healthcare partner for public service employees across the country."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Your Health, Your Choice: The Perfect Fit for Every Pocket Whether you’ve just landed your junior job and are looking for a safety net, or you’re a veteran public servant supporting a family with serious healthcare needs, GEMS has an option tailored to support every unique family, at every stage."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Exceptional Member Service, Nationwide GEMS makes it easy and convenient for its members to access the quality healthcare support they need through its face-to-face member services, available nationwide, at thecomfort of their workplace or at out-stationed service centers.","html":"Exceptional Member Service, Nationwide GEMS makes it easy and convenient for its members to access the quality healthcare support they need through its face-to-face member services, available nationwide, at the
comfort of their workplace or at out-stationed service centers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Whether you live in the deep rural areas or the bustling kasi townships, GEMS has a healthcare partner ready to cater for your needs. This is healthcare that truly reaches every corner of Mzansi.","html":"Whether you live in the deep rural areas or the bustling kasi townships, GEMS has a healthcare partner ready to cater for your needs. This is healthcare that truly reaches every corner of Mzansi."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A trusted partner in your healthcare journey, standing proudly with over 890,000 principal members and over 2.4 million beneficiaries across the country. And here’s the best part, the reason why GEMS continues to grow is because its contributions are approximately *23% less than competitors, and still provides access to quality healthcare services to members.","html":"A trusted partner in your healthcare journey, standing proudly with over 890,000 principal members and over 2.4 million beneficiaries across the country. And here’s the best part, the reason why GEMS continues to grow is because its contributions are approximately *23% less than competitors, and still provides access to quality healthcare services to members."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"That means more money stays in your pocket without compromising on the quality of care you receive.","html":"That means more money stays in your pocket without compromising on the quality of care you receive."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your health is your greatest investment. Every cent you contribute to GEMS is invested right back into your well-being, powering a sustainable medical scheme that protects you, your family, and the future of healthcare for public service employees across Mzansi. *According to Internal Data Analysis","html":"Your health is your greatest investment. Every cent you contribute to GEMS is invested right back into your well-being, powering a sustainable medical scheme that protects you, your family, and the future of healthcare for public service employees across Mzansi. *According to Internal Data Analysis"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information about your options and benefits, please visit our website www.gems.gov.za","html":"For more information about your options and benefits, please visit our website www.gems.gov.za"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
